title: Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now
why_this_song: Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now by McFadden & Whitehead (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "Ain't no stoppin' us now"
Appears 27 times; first heard in: "Ain't no stoppin us now!"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "We're on the move!"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "We've got the groove!"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "We're on the move!"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ain't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ain't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stoppin" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stoppin" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask McFadden & Whitehead one question about "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para McFadden & Whitehead sobre "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Ain't No Stoppin' Us Now" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
